Darius.trading_pattern: Darius Q applies bleed. Your E dash and Q range help. Trade EQ from range.
Darius.ability_to_dodge: His Q outer ring bleed — use E dash to create distance and avoid.
Darius.early_game: Darius dominates early. Use E to create distance. Trade EQ from range.
Darius.mid_game: Your crit scales. His ult is deadly — maintain distance with E.
Darius.late_game: You outscale through crit and E mobility. He struggles if you space.
Darius.win_condition: Use E to create distance. Trade EQ from range. Scale into crit.
Darius.scaling: You outscale through crit and mobility.
Darius.positioning: Use E to kite. Trade from range. Space carefully.

Garen.trading_pattern: Garen Q silence dominates close. Your E dash and range help. Trade EQ from distance.
Garen.ability_to_dodge: His Q silence — use E to create distance before he closes.
Garen.early_game: Garen dominates close. Use E to create distance. Trade EQ.
Garen.mid_game: Your crit scales. His tankiness improves. Maintain distance with E.
Garen.late_game: You outscale through crit. Both scale well.
Garen.win_condition: Use E to create distance. Trade EQ. Scale into crit.
Garen.scaling: You outscale through crit and mobility.
Garen.positioning: Use E to kite. Trade from range. Never close.

Fiora.trading_pattern: Fiora's parry negates your damage. Your E dash helps kite. Use E defensively.
Fiora.ability_to_dodge: Her parry W — use E to create distance before she parries.
Fiora.early_game: Fiora dominates. Use E defensively. Trade from range.
Fiora.mid_game: Your crit scales. Her split push is strong. Avoid dueling.
Fiora.late_game: You outscale through crit. Fiora struggles if you space.
Fiora.win_condition: Use E defensively. Trade from range. Scale into crit.
Fiora.scaling: You outscale through crit and mobility.
Fiora.positioning: Use E defensively. Trade from range. Never duel.

Jax.trading_pattern: Jax's dueling is oppressive. Your E dash and range help. Trade EQ from distance.
Jax.ability_to_dodge: His E stun — use E to create distance before he engages.
Jax.early_game: Jax dominates. Use E to create distance. Trade EQ from range.
Jax.mid_game: Your crit scales. His dueling is strong. Avoid close fights.
Jax.late_game: You outscale through crit. Jax struggles if you space.
Jax.win_condition: Use E to create distance. Trade EQ. Scale into crit.
Jax.scaling: You outscale through crit and mobility.
Jax.positioning: Use E defensively. Trade from range. Avoid extended.

Riven.trading_pattern: Riven's combo vs your E dash is a skill matchup. Trade EQ around her Q.
Riven.ability_to_dodge: Her Q dash — use E to create distance or trade back.
Riven.early_game: Trade EQ when her Q is down. Use E to space. Respect damage.
Riven.mid_game: Both scale similarly. Use E to trade around her cooldowns.
Riven.late_game: You outscale through crit. Both mobile.
Riven.win_condition: Use E to trade. Space around her combo. Scale into crit.
Riven.positioning: Use E to space. Trade EQ. Respect combo.

Aatrox.trading_pattern: Aatrox Q range is massive. Your E dash and Q help. Trade EQ from range.
Aatrox.ability_to_dodge: His Q skillshots — use E to move away. Trade from distance.
Aatrox.early_game: Aatrox Q dominates. Use E to create distance. Trade from range.
Aatrox.mid_game: Your crit scales. His all-in is strong. Avoid extended fights.
Aatrox.late_game: You outscale through crit. He falls off.
Aatrox.win_condition: Use E to create distance. Trade EQ. Scale into crit.
Aatrox.positioning: Use E to space. Trade from range. Avoid extended.

Mordekaiser.trading_pattern: Mordekaiser's all-in is oppressive. Your E dash helps escape. Use E to avoid.
Mordekaiser.ability_to_dodge: His E pull — use E to move away before he pulls.
Mordekaiser.early_game: Mordekaiser dominates. Use E defensively. Trade from distance.
Mordekaiser.mid_game: Your crit scales. His ult can isolate. Avoid 1v1s.
Mordekaiser.late_game: You outscale through crit. He struggles grouped.
Mordekaiser.win_condition: Use E defensively. Trade from range. Group for fights.
Mordekaiser.positioning: Use E defensively. Trade from range. Group for fights.

Nasus.trading_pattern: Nasus has zero early game. Your EQ combos dominate. Trade aggressively.
Nasus.ability_to_dodge: His W wither — use E to create distance. Your aggression is stronger.
Nasus.early_game: Dominate with EQ combos. Nasus is helpless. Build a massive lead.
Nasus.mid_game: Your lead carries. His stacking helps. Use E to kite.
Nasus.late_game: His stacks scale. You outscale through crit. Maintain distance.
Nasus.win_condition: Dominate early with EQ. Build lead. Kite late.
Nasus.scaling: He outscales through stacks — you through crit.
Nasus.positioning: Trade aggressively early. Use E to kite late.

Sion.trading_pattern: Sion's Q poke is strong. Your E dash helps. Trade EQ carefully.
Sion.ability_to_dodge: His Q slow — use E to create distance and dodge.
Sion.early_game: Trade EQ around his Q cooldowns.
Sion.mid_game: Both scale. Your E helps trading. Trade around cooldowns.
Sion.win_condition: Use E to space. Trade EQ. Scale into crit.
Sion.positioning: Use E to space. Trade EQ. Respect tankiness.

Malphite.trading_pattern: Malphite is tanky but low damage. Your EQ combos help. Trade carefully.

Malphite.early_game: Malphite is hard to kill. Trade EQ. Use E to space.
Malphite.mid_game: Your crit scales. His tankiness improves. Avoid extended.
Malphite.win_condition: Trade EQ carefully. Use E to space. Scale into crit.
Malphite.positioning: Use E to space. Trade EQ. Respect tankiness.

Kayle.trading_pattern: Kayle's early range is limited. Your EQ combos are strong. Trade aggressively.
Kayle.ability_to_dodge: Her R invincibility — don't commit when she ults.
Kayle.early_game: Dominate with EQ combos. Kayle's range is limited.
Kayle.mid_game: Her range extends. Your crit scales. Trade carefully.
Kayle.late_game: She scales well. You outscale through crit.
Kayle.win_condition: Dominate early with EQ. Build lead. Scale into crit.
Kayle.scaling: Even — both scale well late game.
Kayle.positioning: Trade EQ aggressively early. Scale into crit.

Illaoi.late_game: You outscale through crit. Avoid tentacles.
